song.title: Beautiful One
song.author: By the Tree
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E F# G#m7 F#/A# E F# B .E F# B/D# Wonderful, so wonderful is Your unfailing love . E F# G#m7 Your cross has spoken mercy over me . E F# B/D# No eye has seen, no ear has heard, no heart can fully know . E F# B How glorious, how beautiful You are
[C] . E F# Beautiful One I love . E F# Beautiful One I adore . E F# B Beautiful One my soul must sing
[V2] Powerful, so powerful, Your glory fills the skies Your mighty works displayed for all to see The beauty of Your majesty awakes my heart to sing How marvelous, how wonderful Your are
[B] . E F# You’ve opened my eyes with Your wonders anew . E F# You’ve captured my heart with this love . E F# B ‘Cause nothing on earth is as beautiful as You
